# Lazar Kulasevic — Software Engineer

> Frontend-specialized Software Engineer (TypeScript, React, Next.js, Vue).
> Based in Serbia, open to Software Engineer roles and frontend-leaning Full-Stack roles.
> Currently at Symphony.is working on an AI-powered platform for managing real-estate for homeowners.

## Key facts

- 5+ years professional frontend experience, product-focused
- Uses AI on a daily basis in the development workflow
- Microfrontends + shared packages included across a fashion retail & apparel system
- Built: paginated TipTap rich text editor, centralized SignalR React library,
  Next.js SSR analytics dashboard, full-stack booking platform MVP
- Current employer: Symphony.is (Dec 2022 – present)
- Previous employer: Wiser Technology (ex Badin Soft) (Dec 2020 – Nov 2022)
- Stack: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Vue, Node.js, Vite, Vitest, Jest,
  Cypress, Docker, GitHub Actions
- Open to: Software Engineer, Frontend Engineer, Full-Stack Engineer (frontend-leaning)

- /knowledge-base.json — machine-readable full profile (JSON)
- /portfolio           — full work history and tech stack (HTML)
